visitor_question: How did you get into the museum?
response: I arrived here in 1897, though it wasn't a particularly dramatic entrance. I was a bit of a hand-me-down, bequeathed to the museum by Sir Augustus Wollaston Franks, having come to him from Captain Francis Charles Burton. It was a rather quiet way to join the collection, but I’ve certainly made myself at home since.

retrieved_metadata.location: On display (Room 52 - Ancient Iran, Display Case 3)
